summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lades-Pro-MD WhatsApp Bot Dashboard - Iteration 2. All backend APIs (28/28 tests passed) and frontend UI components (10/10 pages) are working correctly. Key new features tested: AI Komut Fabrikası with Gemini 3 Flash, Groups IPC endpoint (7 groups), Categorized Commands (23 categories).

minor.issue: SSE stream causes 500 error when accessed via FastAPI proxy (works directly on Node.js port 3001)

issues: Form styling uses basic form-input class instead of glass-input for consistency
Form inputs use basic styling instead of glass-input class used elsewhere

critical_code_review_comments: AI Komut Fabrikası correctly uses Gemini 3 Flash via Emergent LLM Key (emergentintegrations library)
Groups endpoint now uses IPC to parent bot process and returns 7 groups correctly
Categorized commands endpoint returns 23 categories as expected
All navigation pages (10/10) are working correctly
Bot is connected with active WhatsApp session (phone: 17788276641)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (10/10 navigation pages, AI generation, Groups loading, Commands loading)

seed_data_creation: Created test plugin files: ai-test-komut.js, ai-pytest-test.js, ai-save-test-cmd.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard is fully functional. Bot has active WhatsApp session with phone 17788276641. All features tested: AI Komut Fabrikası (Gemini 3 Flash), Uzak Komut (7 groups, 23 categories), all 10 navigation pages. FastAPI proxy on port 8001 works for all endpoints except SSE stream.

tested_features.dashboard_homepage: PASS - Hero card shows 'Sistem Aktif', stats (443 messages, 13 commands, 21 users, 5 groups)
tested_features.sidebar_navigation: PASS - All 10 navigation buttons working (Panel, Bağlantı, İstatistikler, Eklentiler, Komutlar, Duyuru, Canlı Terminal, Ayarlar, AI Komut Fabrikası, Uzak Komut)
tested_features.ai_komut_fabrikasi: PASS - Textarea, 'Komut Üret' button, code generation with Gemini 3 Flash, 'Kaydet & Aktifleştir' button
tested_features.ai_save_command_api: PASS - POST /api/ai/save-command creates ai-{name}.js file in plugins directory
tested_features.uzak_komut_page: PASS - 'Grupları Yenile' loads 7 groups, clicking group auto-fills JID, 'Komutları Yükle' shows 23 categories
tested_features.api_status: PASS - Returns bot status, phone (17788276641), uptime, memory, runtime stats
tested_features.api_groups: PASS - Returns 7 groups with jid, subject, participants
tested_features.api_commands_categorized: PASS - Returns 23 categories (genel, owner, ai, tools, group, system, etc.)
tested_features.api_config: PASS - Returns bot configuration (BOT_NAME, PREFIX, LANG, toggles, API keys)
tested_features.api_plugins: PASS - Returns 43+ plugins with id, name, desc, active status
tested_features.api_runtime_stats: PASS - Returns totalMessages, totalCommands, activeUsers, managedGroups
